metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace backing Microsoft Sentinel.

properties.displayName: TrickMo - Sideloaded APK Masquerading as TikTok
properties.description: Detects download of an Android package masquerading as TikTok over the corporate proxy, consistent with the TrickMo/Coper banking-trojan dropper (TikTok18.apk). Enterprise mapping T1566 (Phishing); mobile ATT&CK equivalents T1660 (Phishing) / T1456 (Drive-by Compromise). Tune app-store allowlist. Source: CYBERXTRON 2026-05-11.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where RequestURL endswith ".apk"
| where RequestURL has_any ("tiktok", "tik_tok", "tiktok18")
| where DestinationHostName !has "play.google.com"
| extend AdvisoryName = "TrickMo Android DTO Malware", ThreatActor = "TrickMo/Coper"
| project TimeGenerated, SourceIP, SourceUserName, DestinationHostName, RequestURL, DeviceAction, DeviceVendor, AdvisoryName, ThreatActor

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Detects download of an Android package masquerading as TikTok over the corporate proxy, consistent with the TrickMo/Coper banking-trojan dropper (TikTok18.apk). Enterprise mapping T1566 (Phishing); mobile ATT&CK equivalents T1660 (Phishing) / T1456 (Drive-by Compromise). Tune app-store allowlist. Source: CYBERXTRON 2026-05-11.
